Illegal HTML: illegal html element: scheme (-space of an information entity. Typical values include hierarchical directory paths for any machine. For example, with scheme = "ftp", path might be `"/pub/images/image_01"`. The strings "." and ".." are reserved for use in the path. Paths may include internet/intranet location identifiers of the form: `sub_domain...domain`, e.g. `"info.cern.ch"`.)
